# Third-party licenses

This repository redistributes the following unmodified, pinned artifacts so
the site can serve everything from its own origin (see PLAN.md). Each remains
under its own license; source is available at the linked upstreams.

| Artifact | Version | License | Upstream |
|---|---|---|---|
| Pyodide (CPython on WASM) | 314.0.2 | MPL-2.0 | https://github.com/pyodide/pyodide |
| NumPy (Pyodide wheel) | 2.4.3 | BSD-3-Clause | https://github.com/numpy/numpy |
| Transformers.js | 4.2.0 | Apache-2.0 | https://github.com/huggingface/transformers.js |
| ONNX Runtime Web (WASM binaries) | per package-lock | MIT | https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime |
| all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (q8 ONNX + tokenizer, in `/models`) | Xenova conversion | Apache-2.0 | https://huggingface.co/sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2 |
| Departure Mono (in `/src/fonts`) | 1.500 | OFL-1.1 (included alongside) | https://github.com/rektdeckard/departure-mono |
| Space Grotesk (in `/src/fonts`) | 2.0.0 | OFL-1.1 (included alongside) | https://github.com/floriankarsten/space-grotesk |

Everything else in this repository — site code, design, and content — is by
Shane Sparks. Its license is stated in the repository root (or, absent a
LICENSE file, all rights reserved).
